from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """
    Convert a list of triples about an artist into a single fluent sentence.
    """
    if not triples:
        return ""

    # Remove duplicates efficiently
    seen = set()
    unique_triples = []
    for t in triples:
        key = (t.subject, t.predicate, t.object)
        if key not in seen:
            seen.add(key)
            unique_triples.append(t)
    triples = unique_triples[:10]  # Limit to avoid timeout

    if not triples:
        return ""

    # Find main subject
    main_subject = triples[0].subject

    # Predicate phrase templates
    def get_phrase(predicate: str, subject: str, obj: str, is_relative: bool = False) -> str:
        if is_relative:
            templates = {
                "birthPlace": f"was born in {obj}",
                "deathPlace": f"died in {obj}",
                "origin": f"originates from {obj}",
                "country": f"is in {obj}",
                "location": f"located in {obj}",
                "capital": f"capital is {obj}",
                "genre": f"performs {obj} genre",
                "instrument": f"plays {obj}",
                "recordLabel": f"signed to {obj}",
                "nationality": f"nationality is {obj}",
            }
        else:
            templates = {
                "birthDate": f"{subject} was born on {obj}",
                "deathDate": f"{subject} died on {obj}",
                "birthPlace": f"{subject} was born in {obj}",
                "deathPlace": f"{subject} died in {obj}",
                "origin": f"{subject} originates from {obj}",
                "nationality": f"{subject} is {obj}",
                "genre": f"{subject} performs {obj}",
                "instrument": f"{subject} plays {obj}",
                "occupation": f"{subject} works as {obj}",
                "associatedBand/associatedMusicalArtist": f"{subject} is associated with {obj}",
                "recordLabel": f"{subject} is signed to {obj}",
                "activeYearsStartYear": f"{subject} started career in {obj}",
                "activeYearsEndYear": f"{subject} ended career in {obj}",
                "birthYear": f"{subject} was born in {obj}",
                "alternativeName": f"{subject} also known as {obj}",
                "background": f"{subject} is a {obj}",
                "training": f"{subject} trained at {obj}",
                "location": f"{subject} located in {obj}",
                "isPartOf": f"{subject} is part of {obj}",
                "capital": f"capital is {obj}",
                "country": f"{subject} is in {obj}",
            }
        return templates.get(predicate, f"{subject} {predicate} {obj}")

    # Build phrases for main subject
    main_phrases = []
    for t in triples:
        if t.subject == main_subject:
            main_phrases.append(get_phrase(t.predicate, t.subject, t.object, False))

    # Build relative clauses for other subjects
    relative_phrases = []
    for t in triples:
        if t.subject != main_subject:
            if t.predicate in ["birthPlace", "deathPlace", "origin", "country", "location", "capital"]:
                relative_phrases.append(get_phrase(t.predicate, t.subject, t.object, True))

    # Combine into single sentence
    if main_phrases:
        result = main_phrases[0]
        for phrase in main_phrases[1:]:
            result += f", {phrase}"
        if relative_phrases:
            result += f" which {'; '.join(relative_phrases)}"
        return result + "."
    return "."

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
